mismatches.description: Frontend calls GET /sessions/stats/summary but backend endpoint is GET /sessions/stats. The '/summary' suffix is not part of the backend route.
mismatches.impact: Frontend call will return 404 Not Found

mismatches.description: Frontend calls GET /journal-entries/stats/summary but backend defines GET /journal-entries/digital-garden. These are different endpoints with different purposes.
mismatches.impact: Frontend will attempt to call a non-existent endpoint, returning 404

mismatches.backend: profileImage handled in PUT /users/me as multipart-form-data
mismatches.description: Frontend expects separate endpoints for image management (PUT /users/me/image, DELETE /users/me/image), but backend expects image to be included in PUT /users/me multipart form request.
mismatches.impact: Frontend calls to PUT /users/me/image and DELETE /users/me/image will return 404. Profile image updates via separate requests will fail.

mismatches.issue: Frontend calls endpoint that doesn't exist
mismatches.description: Frontend has a deleteProfileImage function that calls DELETE /users/me/image, but this endpoint is not defined in the backend.
mismatches.impact: Frontend call will return 404 Not Found

mismatches.frontend: getMe() in auth.api.js vs getMe() in users.api.js
mismatches.description: Frontend has getMe() in both auth.api.js and users.api.js. Both call different endpoints (/auth/me vs /users/me). Code review needed to determine if both are necessary.
mismatches.impact: Potential confusion about which endpoint to use; possible duplicate API calls in components

mismatches.issue: No logout endpoint in auth.api.js call matches backend
mismatches.description: Frontend logout function correctly calls the backend endpoint. This is not a mismatch, just confirming alignment.

priority_fixes.fix: Fix session stats endpoint - Change frontend call from '/sessions/stats/summary' to '/sessions/stats'
Fix journal stats endpoint - Either update frontend to call '/journal-entries/digital-garden' or create new backend endpoint '/journal-entries/stats/summary'
Fix user image endpoints - Create separate endpoints for PUT /users/me/image and DELETE /users/me/image in backend, or update frontend to include image in PUT /users/me
priority_fixes.file: Both frontend and backend need alignment

priority_fixes.fix: Remove deleteProfileImage from frontend or implement corresponding backend endpoint
